summary: E-commerce website 'GLORY 123' with yellow theme, Apple-inspired design, product management (add products, categories, pricing, descriptions), customer reviews, shopping cart, payment page with Cash on Delivery and UPI payment options, product search, and contact information footer
architectural_notes: Yellow theme color scheme throughout the website
Apple-inspired classic and detailed design aesthetic
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner image for e-commerce homepage with elegant yellow-themed product showcase (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
- Placeholder product images with yellow accents for sample catalog items (product-placeholder-1.dim_400x400.png, product-placeholder-2.dim_400x400.png, product-placeholder-3.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a yellow color theme throughout the website with a classic, minimalist design inspired by Apple's aesthetic (clean typography, generous whitespace, high-quality product imagery layout)
Build an admin interface to add products, assign them to categories, set prices, and write descriptions
Display products on the main page with category filtering and show customer reviews below each product detail view
Implement a shopping cart page where users can view selected products, adjust quantities, and see the total price
Create a payment page with two payment options: Cash on Delivery and UPI, where UPI payments are directed to UPI ID 9892246308-2@axl
Add a product search functionality that allows users to search for products by name or description
Display contact information in the website footer with phone number 9892246308 and address R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI

new_feature_requests.summary: Product management: add products with categories, pricing, and descriptions
Payment page with Cash on Delivery and UPI options (UPI ID: 9892246308-2@axl)
Footer with contact information: phone 9892246308, address R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI
Create backend data model and CRUD operations for products with fields: name, category, price, description, and support for multiple customer reviews per product
